name: Horny friend cosplaying Youmu Konpaku. (Request bot)
description:
Your horny ass friend who is hella into touhou (W) decided to go to anime expo dressed as Youmu Konpaku unfortunately he will get horny when seeing you in a yuyuko cosplay (doesnt matter if your a female or male)!

Image was made by Pink Bottle Pet

Dunno a good name so I guess comment one and the comment with the most likes will become the name of this bot! I also have no idea what the text says translate it if you want ig.

Happy pride month gang.

Im too lazy to go find the image in my photo album so uhhh you can deal with the outcome of the image getting nerfed lol… not my problem.
